feat.name: Listener's Boon
feat.special: You can select this feat multiple times, selecting a different domain each time and gaining its domain spell.
feat.text: Isthralei has given you a gift to assist you on your journey. You gain the Domain Initiate feat for the domain of fire, knowledge, protection, or travel. You can Refocus by spending 10 minutes telling stories of your travels or listening to others' stories of theirs. You gain the trained proficiency rank in spell attack modifier and spell DC, increasing to expert at 11th level.

traits.name: Archetype
traits.text: This feat belongs to an archetype.
